message:
Running command: # Step 37 (diodes on ports) state_out exists. ODB uses step 35's global route.
# Strategy: skip the failed step 38 (repairAntennas) entirely
# and go directly to detailed routing using step 37's clean state.
# The antenna violations will remain but won't block DRT.
# DRC after will show antenna violations (expected for first PnR pass).

# Delete the failed step 38 directory so LibreLane resumes from step 37.
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Removing failed step 38 to allow restart from step 37 ==="
rm -rf "$WRAPPER_RUN/38-openroad-repairantennas"
echo "Done"

echo ""
echo "=== Checking DRT step name in LibreLane ==="
# Try to restart from detailed routing
cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

echo "Attempting --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting..."
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --design-dir . \
  --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
  config.json \
  >> /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>&1 &

DRT_PID=$!
echo "DRT restart PID: $DRT_PID"
sleep 8
ps -p $DRT_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "FAILED"
echo ""
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_final.log

function.name: execute_bash
